releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added a note about Latex Suite compatibility to README - see https://github.com/RyotaUshio/obsidian-inline-math/issues/6#issuecomment-2442938736 for the details.
- Removed the clean-up commands since they are no longer necessary.
- Replaced a `h4` heading in the setting tab with a heading setting, complying Obsidian's plugin guideline.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RyotaUshio/obsidian-inline-math/compare/0.3.5...0.3.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added a new option **Disable when using IME input**, which will fix some strange behavior observed when using IME input after escaping from a math block using Latex Suite's tabout feature.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RyotaUshio/obsidian-inline-math/compare/0.3.4...0.3.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fixed a bug introduced by the [previous update](https://github.com/RyotaUshio/obsidian-inline-math/releases/tag/0.3.3):

> A potential performance improvement for a very large document.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RyotaUshio/obsidian-inline-math/compare/0.3.3...0.3.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- #5: Fixed an incompatibility issue with Latex Suite's "box current equation" command.
- A potential performance improvement for a very large document.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RyotaUshio/obsidian-inline-math/compare/0.3.2...0.3.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed the incompatibility issue with Latex Suite's [matrix shortcuts](https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite#matrix-shortcuts) feature.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed a bug where inserting non-whitespace character at the beginning of an inline math caused the insertion to happen between the leading dollar and braces.
- Fixed the incompatibility issue with Latex Suite's tabout feature (#4).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 🎉 Now this plugin automatically removes hidden braces when you escape from an inline math (#3)!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Slightly improved performance when "Disable in tables" is turned off.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Improvement

- Eliminated the need for manual registeration of deletion keys. As a result, "Register deletion keys" setting has been removed from the setting tab.
    - This was intended to add support for the Vim normal mode, but unfortunately, it turned out that there are still some challanges to overcome. It ~~might be~~ is an upstream bug of codemirror-vim (https://github.com/replit/codemirror-vim/issues/143).
- Added support for [multiple cursors](https://help.obsidian.md/Editing+and+formatting/Multiple+cursors).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fix the bug where "Press deletion keys..." message in the setting tab does not disappear after pressing the `x` icon.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Add a new setting "Disable in table" (#2) to alleviate the unnatural behavior when combined with [Advanced Tables](https://github.com/tgrosinger/advanced-tables-obsidian).
    - For now, it doesn't work for tables inside blockquotes or callouts.
- Replace "bracket" with "brace" in the UI

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added the debug mode to make it easy for users to report issues.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Now two clean-up commands are available. Don't worry about the bracket pollution anymore!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: In the plugin setting tab, the deletion keys pressed by users are now displayed in a suitable format depending platforms.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This is the very first release of **No More Flickering Inline Math**.
